title: UK Daily Deals: PlayStation Portal, PS5 Pro, Corsair Gaming Headsets, and More Discounts
description: Grab the PS5 Pro for £699 and the PlayStation Portal for £185 in the UK, beating the massive hardware price hikes introduced by Sony earlier this year.

title: GameStop Is Running a “Buy 2, Get 1 Free” Sale on All Pre-Owned Games, but Only for Pro Members
description: GameStop has launched a new “Buy 2, Get 1 Free” sale on all pre-owned games, but it's exclusively for Pro members. If you're a member, you can save on PS5, Xbox Series X, and Nintendo Switch/Switch 2 releases.

title: MTG Marvel Super Heroes Set Has Launched with Huge Amazon Discounts Already Up for Grabs
description: Magic: The Gathering's Marvel Super Heroes set has officially launched, and Amazon is already offering massive 40% discounts on Play Booster boxes and gear.

title: Pokémon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions ETBs Are Back in Stock, and Under Market Price at Amazon
description: Amazon has restocked Pokémon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions Elite Trainer Boxes at under market price, but they are likely to sell out fast.
